def negative_repeated_pure_helper_call_on_same_input_without_local_cache():
    rule_id = "repeated_pure_helper_call_on_same_input_without_local_cache"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag hot loops that recompute the same pure helper result for identical inputs in one scope."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
